Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}The anmitsu was absolutely delightful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Mmm... Their azuki bean paste was just the right amount of sweetness. I think I'm hooked![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I know people say sugar is bad for you, but there are some health benefits.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}In fact, glucose is an essential source of fuel for your brain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know how you sometimes get hungry after using your brain all day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's caused by low levels of glucose, which makes your blood sugar drop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems really happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали значно ближчими сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's too bad... I love sweets, actually.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}I thought that, if we had similar tastes in food, I could make you lunch sometime, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}To each their own, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems a little disappointed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми не стали ближчими сьогодні...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5107 0 0}{f 5 13 3 15 6}I see... Are you the type of person who doesn't have a favorite food?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest, I'm a bit like that, too. I'm only interested in cooking food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}You know how some people would stand in line for hours just to buy some popular desserts?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I could never understand why anyone would do that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Haha, guess we're kind of alike—just in a weird way?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka is laughing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я дізнався про неї трохи більше сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I think it's important to try all kinds of food though. That way, I can improve my cooking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}If I come up with a new recipe, would you like to try it? Maybe I could make something with black sugar...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We continued to chat while[n]heading back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
